ksa_text: Ability to conduct risk assessments and analyses of systems, processes, and operational environments to identify, evaluate, and prioritize compliance-related and operational risks.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Excluded on scope grounds: Risk Management domain has low affinity (0.72) for Data Governance Council Chair, and the text — 'Ability to conduct risk assessments and analyses of systems, processes, and operational environments...' — describes competencies outside the policy/oversight/governance mandate. No GOV-specific signals detected. STRM composite is strong (0.5150).

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 2 match(es) in governance job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Data Governance Council Chair whose mandate centers on policy, oversight, and governance.
